channel.title: Rodney Chery | Technical Articles
channel.description: Insights on healthcare software, AI, and ASP.NET Core.

item.title: Zero-Cost ASP.NET Core: Building a Markdown Blog on Cloudflare Pages
item.description: How to combine the power of ASP.NET Core with Python static site generation to host a fully-featured, markdown-driven blog on Cloudflare for $0/month.
